column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: BUKRS
column.description: Company Code

column.name: ANLN1
column.description: Main Asset Number

column.name: ANLN2
column.description: Asset Subnumber

column.name: GJAHR
column.description: Fiscal Year

column.name: AFABE
column.description: Real depreciation area

column.name: ZUJHR
column.description: Asset acquisition year (currently not used)

column.name: ZUCOD
column.description: Sub-classification of asset acquisitions(currently not used)

column.name: AFBLPE
column.description: Period in which last depreciation was posted

column.name: AFBANZ
column.description: Number of depreciation posting runs in the period

column.name: XAFAR
column.description: Indicator: Errors in depreciation

column.name: NDABJ
column.description: Expired useful life in years at start of the fiscal year

column.name: NDABP
column.description: Expired useful life in periods at start of fiscal year

column.name: ANDSJ
column.description: Yrs Expired up to Fisc.Yr Start from Start of Spec.Dep.

column.name: ANDSP
column.description: Expired useful life in periods during FY from SDep start dat

column.name: RSTCK
column.description: Number of units depreciated in unit-of-prod. depreciation

column.name: KANSW
column.description: Cumulative acquisition and production costs

column.name: KAUFW
column.description: Cumulative revaluation on the replacement value

column.name: KINVZ
column.description: Cumulative investment grants

column.name: KNAFA
column.description: Accumulated ordinary depreciation

column.name: KSAFA
column.description: Cumulative special depreciation

column.name: KAAFA
column.description: Cumulative unplanned depreciation

column.name: KMAFA
column.description: Cumulative reserves transfer

column.name: KZINW
column.description: Cumulative interest

column.name: KAUFN
column.description: Cumulative revaluation of ordinary depreciation

column.name: KANZA
column.description: Cumulative down payments

column.name: KVOST
column.description: Cumulative input tax

column.name: AUFWP
column.description: Planned revaluation on replacement value

column.name: NAFAP
column.description: Planned ordinary depreciation for the year

column.name: SAFAP
column.description: Planned special depreciation for the year

column.name: AAFAP
column.description: Scheduled unplanned depreciation for the year

column.name: MAFAP
column.description: Planned transfer of reserves for the year

column.name: ZINSP
column.description: Interest planned for the year

column.name: AUFNP
column.description: Planned revaluation of accumulated ordinary depreciation

column.name: AUFWB
column.description: Revaluation posted on replacement value

column.name: NAFAG
column.description: Ordinary depreciation posted in the current year

column.name: SAFAG
column.description: Special depreciation posted in the current fiscal year

column.name: AAFAG
column.description: Unplanned depreciation posted for the year

column.name: MAFAG
column.description: Acquisition value reducing depreciation posted for the year

column.name: ZINSG
column.description: Interest posted for the year

column.name: AUFNG
column.description: Posted revaluation of accumulated ordinary depreciation

column.name: ANSWL
column.description: Transactions for the year affecting asset values

column.name: ABGAN
column.description: Total retirements and retiring transfers

column.name: ANSAZ
column.description: Down payments on asset

column.name: AUFWM
column.description: Manual revaluation on replacement value

column.name: INVZM
column.description: Investment grant for the year

column.name: NAFAM
column.description: Manually planned ordinary depreciation for the year

column.name: SAFAM
column.description: Manual special depreciation planned for the year

column.name: AAFAM
column.description: Manual unplanned depreciation for the year

column.name: MAFAM
column.description: Manual transfer of reserves for the year

column.name: ZINSM
column.description: Manual interest planned for the year

column.name: AUFNM
column.description: Manual revaluation of cumulative ordinary depreciation

column.name: ZUSNA
column.description: Write-up on ordinary depreciation

column.name: ZUSSA
column.description: Write-up on special depreciation

column.name: ZUSAA
column.description: Write-up on unplanned depreciation

column.name: ZUSMA
column.description: Write-up on transferred reserves

column.name: AUFWV
column.description: Proportional cumulative revaluation on replacement value

column.name: INVZV
column.description: Proportional cumulative investment grants

column.name: NAFAV
column.description: Proportional accumulated ordinary depreciation

column.name: SAFAV
column.description: Proportional cumulative special depreciation

column.name: AAFAV
column.description: Proportional cumulative unplanned depreciation

column.name: MAFAV
column.description: Proportional cumulative transfer of reserves

column.name: AUFNV
column.description: Proportional cum. revaluation on ordinary depreciation

column.name: AUFWL
column.description: Proportional revaluation for the year on replacement value

column.name: INVZL
column.description: Proportional investment grant for the year

column.name: NAFAL
column.description: Proportional ordinary depreciation for the year

column.name: SAFAL
column.description: Proportional special depreciation for the year

column.name: AAFAL
column.description: Proportional unplanned depreciation for the year

column.name: MAFAL
column.description: Proportional transfer of reserves for the year

column.name: AUFNL
column.description: Proportional revaluation of annual ordinary dep.

column.name: ANUPD
column.description: Indicator: Type of change to table

column.name: KSANS
column.description: Cumulative statistical acquisition value

column.name: SANSL
column.description: Statistical aquisition value of current year

column.name: PSTBEG
column.description: FI-AA: Posting depreciation as of period xy

column.name: PSTEND
column.description: FI-AA: Posting depreciation up to period xy

column.name: PSTCALC
column.description: FI-AA: New calculation of depreciation during posting

column.name: PSTPER
column.description: FI-AA: Depreciation calculation from period X
